title: Halloween Ghost Cookie Cutter | 3D Printed PLA Baking Tool | Spooky Ghost Shape 7-8cm Medium Size Fondant Cutter
description:
Bring spooky fun to your kitchen this Halloween with our adorable ghost cookie cutter! This charming Halloween ghost design is perfect for creating festive cookies, fondant decorations, and other baked treats that will delight trick-or-treaters and party guests alike. Whether you're hosting a haunted house party, preparing a Halloween bake sale, or simply enjoying a cozy autumn baking session with your family, this ghost cookie cutter will become your go-to tool for the spooky season.

Features:
Our Halloween ghost cookie cutter is 3D printed with precision and care, ensuring clean, sharp edges that cut through cookie dough and fondant effortlessly. The design features a classic ghost silhouette with a playful, whimsical shape that captures the spirit of Halloween perfectly. The cutter is lightweight yet sturdy, comfortable to press into dough, and designed to release cleanly every time. The smooth edges ensure your cookies come out with well-defined shapes, making decorating a breeze. Each cutter is made to order, meaning you receive a freshly printed, high-quality product every time.

Dimensions:
This is a Medium (M) size cookie cutter, measuring approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at its widest point. This size is ideal for standard cookies that are not too large and not too small — just the right portion for snacking, decorating, and gifting. The cutting depth is optimized for typical cookie dough thickness, giving you consistent results with every use.

How to Use:
Simply roll out your cookie dough or fondant to your desired thickness, then press the ghost cutter firmly and evenly into the dough. Lift the cutter straight up and gently remove excess dough from around the shape. For best results, dip the cutter in a light dusting of flour or powdered sugar before each cut to prevent sticking. You can also use this cutter with modeling clay, craft foam, or soft cheese for creative non-baking projects.

Care Instructions:
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. To clean, simply rinse under lukewarm water with mild soap and allow to air dry completely before storing. Avoid soaking for extended periods and keep away from high heat sources, as PLA can warp at elevated temperatures. Store in a cool, dry place to maintain the shape and longevity of your cutter.

Gift Ideas:
This Halloween ghost cookie cutter makes a wonderful gift for bakers, Halloween enthusiasts, and anyone who loves getting creative in the kitchen. It's a fantastic stocking stuffer or party favor for Halloween celebrations. Pair it with a favorite cookie recipe card and some festive sprinkles for a thoughtful, handmade gift basket. It's also perfect for teachers, coworkers, or friends who enjoy seasonal baking. Kids and adults alike will love using this cutter to bring spooky shapes to life during the fall season.

About Our Shop:
All of our cookie cutters are handmade and 3D printed in small batches, ensuring exceptional quality and attention to detail with every single piece. Each item is printed to order, which means we create your cutter fresh just for you, minimizing waste and maximizing care. We are a small, passionate shop dedicated to bringing unique, creative baking tools to kitchens around the world. Thank you for supporting our small business — we truly appreciate every order and look forward to helping you bake something magical!
